name: claimable-postgres
description: >- Provision instant temporary Postgres databases via Claimable Postgres by Neon (pg.new) with no login, signup, or credit card. Use when users ask for a quick Postgres environment, a throwaway DATABASE_URL for prototyping/tests, or "just give me a DB now". Triggers include: "quick postgres", "temporary postgres", "no signup database", "no credit card database", "instant DATABASE_URL".
author: neondatabase
summary_zh: 这是一款免注册免绑卡、秒开临时Postgres数据库的工具，适合写原型或做测试时急需用完即弃的数据库地址，让你立刻就能用上现成环境。
